title: CPU pinned at 100% by a runaway process
description_md:
This box is sluggish and its single CPU core is pinned at 100%. Something is stuck in a busy loop. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), identify the runaway process, and stop it so the CPU frees up.

The container is deliberately capped at 0.5 vCPU (that's the whole machine here), so a single spinning process starves everything else — exactly the situation you're diagnosing. You're done when the runaway process is no longer running.
